'''charobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivorytype|ivorytype]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivorytype|ivorytype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| charobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chærebeth|chærebeth]] || [[word:chærebej|chærebej]] || [[word:chærebesh|chærebesh]] || [[word:chærebe|chærebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:charoroboth|charoroboth]] || [[word:charoroboj|charoroboj]] || [[word:charorobosh|charorobosh]] || [[word:charorobo|charorobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:charoboth|charoboth]] || [[word:charoboj|charoboj]] || [[word:charobosh|charobosh]] || [[word:charobo|charobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:charofboth|charofboth]] || [[word:charofboj|charofboj]] || [[word:charofbosh|charofbosh]] || [[word:charofbof|charofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:charobotho|charobotho]] || [[word:charobojo|charobojo]] || [[word:charobosho|charobosho]] || [[word:charoboko|charoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:charoboth|charoboth]] || [[word:charoboj|charoboj]] || [[word:charobosh|charobosh]] || [[word:charobo|charobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:charobothol|charobothol]] || [[word:charobojol|charobojol]] || [[word:charoboshol|charoboshol]] || [[word:charobokol|charobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:charobothotho|charobothotho]] || [[word:charobojojo|charobojojo]] || [[word:charoboshosho|charoboshosho]] || [[word:charoboko|charoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:charobothon|charobothon]] || [[word:charobojon|charobojon]] || [[word:charoboshon|charoboshon]] || [[word:charobokon|charobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:charobothoro|charobothoro]] || [[word:charobojoro|charobojoro]] || [[word:charoboshoro|charoboshoro]] || [[word:charobokoro|charobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
